questionText: Does your organization use scenario analysis to identify environmental outcomes?
questionKo: 귀사는 경영전략 수립에 대한 환경적 영향 및 결과를 파악하기 위해 시나리오 분석을 사용하고 있습니까 ?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Scenario analysis is considered a valuable tool to inform an organization's business strategy as part of transitioning to a sustainable economy. This question establishes whether your organization uses scenario analysis to identify environment-related outcomes, which is a recommended practice for businesses preparing for possible futures.

options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

options: Every three years or less frequently
optionsKo: Every three years 또는 less frequently

guidance.text:
Frequency of analysis (column 2) 
Indicate the frequency with which your organization undertakes a scenario analysis exercise. This may include a full assessment, or an update to existing scenarios or a previous scenario analysis. 
Primary reason why your organization has not used scenario analysis (column 3) 
This column is only presented if either "No…" option is selected in column 1 "Use of scenario analysis". 
If more than one reason applies to your organization, select the reason which is most relevant and elaborate on the other reasons in column 4 "Explain why your organization has not used scenario analysis". 
Explain why your organization has not used scenario analysis (column 4) 
This column is only presented if either "No…" option is selected in column 1 "Use of scenario analysis". 
Provide an organization-specific explanation of why you do not use environment-related scenario analysis to inform your strategy and outline any plans to do so in the future. 
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant", explain the criteria used to decide that environment-related scenario analysis is not important for your organization. 
If you selected "Lack of internal resources", specify whether this relates to lack of internal expertise, data availability, funds to outsource the analysis or other resources.

guidance.text:
The TCFD Guidance on Scenario Analysis for Non-Financial Companies identifies two main types of scenarios: (1) exploratory scenarios used to explore a range of different possible futures and (2) normative scenarios used to plan for a preferred future. The essential difference is that with normative scenarios, scenario analysis begins with a desired future outcome and works backward to inform decisions on what is needed to achieve that outcome. With exploratory scenarios, the scenario analysis instead begins from the present, and then describes a diverse set of plausible future states.   
Normative scenarios are typically used for assessment and setting of specific targets and implementation plans, while exploratory scenarios are used to assess potential climate-related risks and uncertainties and test the resiliency of various strategies to a wide range of future conditions. The TCFD recommends the use of an exploratory approach.   
The TNFD Guidance on scenario analysis provides guidance for organizations who choose to use scenario analysis to explore the possible consequences of nature loss and climate change.
guidance.textKo: The TCFD Guidance on 시나리오 분석 for Non-Financial Companies identifies two main types of scenarios: (1) exploratory scenarios used to explore a range of different possible futures 및 (2) normative scenarios used to plan for a preferred future. The essential difference is that with normative scenarios, 시나리오 분석 begins with a desired future outcome 및 works backward to inform decisions on what is needed to achieve that outcome. With exploratory scenarios, the 시나리오 분석 instead begins from the present, 및 then 설명s a diverse set of plausible future states. Normative scenarios are typically used for assessment 및 setting of specific 목표 및 이행 plans, while exploratory scenarios are used to assess potential climate-related 리스크 및 uncertainties 및 test the resiliency of various strategies to a wide range of future conditions. The TCFD recommends the use of an exploratory approach. The TNFD Guidance on 시나리오 분석 provides guidance for organizations who choose to use 시나리오 분석 to explore the possible consequences of nature loss 및 기후변화.

guidance.text: The organization uses scenario analysis to identify risks and opportunities with respect to environmental issues and to assess the resilience of its strategy and business and model to the risks.
guidance.textKo: The organization uses 시나리오 분석 to identify 리스크 및 기회 with respect to 환경 이슈 및 to assess the resilience of its 전략 및 business 및 model to the 리스크.

guidance.text:
Environmental outcomes: scenario analysis enables decision makers to identify and evaluate potential outcomes and their effects on their organization, based on a variety of scenarios. The outcomes may be related to environmental issues themselves, or have implications for the governance of the organization, or for its wider business strategy. 
Scenario analysis: a scenario describes a potential path of development that will lead to a particular outcome or goal. Scenario analysis is the process of highlighting central elements of a possible future and drawing attention to key factors (or critical uncertainties). It is a tool to enhance critical strategic thinking by challenging "business-as-usual" assumptions, and to explore alternatives based on their relative and absolute impact and likelihood of occurrence. Scenarios are not forecasts or predictions, but tools to describe potential pathways.
guidance.textKo: Environmental outcomes: 시나리오 분석 enables decision makers to identify 및 evaluate potential outcomes 및 their effects on their organization, based on a variety of scenarios. The outcomes may be related to 환경 이슈 themselves, 또는 have implications 에 대한 거버넌스 의 organization, 또는 for its wider 사업전략. 시나리오 분석: a scenario 설명s a potential path of development that will lead to a particular outcome 또는 goal. 시나리오 분석 is the 프로세스 of highlighting central elements of a possible future 및 drawing attention to key factors (or critical uncertainties). It is a tool to enhance critical strategic thinking by challenging "business-as-usual" assumptions, 및 to explore alternatives based on their relative 및 absolute impact 및 likelihood of occurrence. Scenarios are not forecasts 또는 predictions, but tools to 설명 potential pathways.

criteria.criteriaKo: For '기후변화' 행: 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 'Use of 시나리오 분석' - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, but we plan to within the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Use of 시나리오 분석' - 0/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/1점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 'No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Use of 시나리오 분석' - 0/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Use of 시나리오 분석' NOT 완성 - 0/5 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/5점입니다.
